आमरस-पुरीचा बेत, म्हणजे सुखाची थेट भेट! 🥭✨
पुण्यातला उन्हाळा आणि राजलक्ष्मी बँक्वेट्सचा अस्सल आमरस... हे समीकरणच वेगळं आहे! रसाळ गोड आमरस आणि गरमागरम पुऱ्यांचा आस्वाद घ्यायला तुम्ही येताय ना?
तुमच्या घरच्या खास समारंभाला द्या ‘पाध्ये डिंगणकर केटरिंग’च्या अस्सल चवीची जोड. 😋
📍 राजलक्ष्मी | कलादर्शन | ओम बँक्वेट्स, पुणे.
📞 आजच तुमची तारीख बुक करा! +91 87882 84212

alt: A high-angle, professional food photography shot for Rajlakshmi Banquets and Padhye Dingankar Catering. The image features two ornate silver bowls filled with thick, vibrant orange Aamras (mango pulp), garnished intricately with sliced pistachios and saffron strands. Beside them sits a silver platter of golden-brown, puffed Puris. The background includes a rustic dark aesthetic with a bowl of almonds and pistachios, a silver Ganesha idol, and fresh curry leaves. Text in Marathi invites guests to taste "Authentic Aamras," featuring logos for Rajlakshmi Banquets, Kaladarshan, and Om Banquets.

caption:
Let’s go fam, our fav weekend plan is live! 
Board Game Meetups Pune is hosting
🗓️: 2 May’26, Saturday from 11 AM to 2 PM
📍: Knock Out Sports Bar, Baner
🎟️ Ticket @ ₹500 per person includes ₹100 redeemable F&B coupon + with unlimited games, laughter, fun and win surprises on food & beverage orders! 🎉

🔗 Registration link in bio @boardgame_meetups_pune

Follow us and join our WhatsApp channel for updates. 
- You can join late (new game starts every ~15 mins) 🕰️
- No prior game experience needed (we all help each other!) 🫂
- Don’t hesitate to join solo (you’re sure to have fun regardless, we have super awesome people who join us!) 🎉
- 40+ games available to play + participants can bring their own games too if they want
- More FAQs answered on instagram page
- DM @boardgame_meetups_pune for any other queries

.
